Container.Name: YAHLP-Public-Basic
Container.Description: YAHLP - Public Mode (HTTPS via Let's Encrypt + Basic Auth). For internet-facing deployments with automatic SSL certificates and username/password protection.
Container.Overview:
YAHLP - Yet Another HomeLab Portal - Public Mode with Basic Auth
Configured for public internet deployment with: - HTTPS with automatic Let's Encrypt certificates - Basic authentication (username/password) - Requires domain name and email address - Ports 80 and 443 must be port-forwarded
Setup Requirements: 1. Add DNS A record pointing your domain to your server IP 2. Ensure ports 80 and 443 are port-forwarded from router 3. Configure basic auth credentials (format: user:pass or user1:pass1|user2:pass2) 4. Set TEST_MODE=false once ready for production to avoid Let's Encrypt rate limiting

Variable.Name: TEST_MODE
Variable.Description: Enable test/debug mode. Set to 'true' to prevent Let's Encrypt rate limiting during setup.

Variable.Name: ACCESS_MODE
Variable.Description: Choose 'private' for HTTP only on internal network, or 'public' for HTTPS with Let's Encrypt.

Variable.Name: DOMAIN
Variable.Description: Your domain name for public mode (e.g., media.example.com). Leave blank for private mode.

Variable.Name: EMAIL
Variable.Description: Email for SSL certificate notifications. Required for public mode.

Variable.Name: DASHBOARD_NAME
Variable.Description: Name displayed in dashboard header and browser title.

Variable.Name: DASHBOARD_COLOR
Variable.Description: Primary color in hex format (e.g., #00A99D). Sets dashboard accent color.

Variable.Name: DASHBOARD_STYLE
Variable.Description: Choose layout: classic, modern, storm, storm-violet, neon, focus, vixens, minimal. Append ':only' to lock layout (e.g., modern:only).

Variable.Name: DASHBOARD_ORDER
Variable.Description: Comma-separated service codes. Order: USENET (SAB, GET, HYD), TORRENTS (TRA, QBI, DEL), SEARCH (PRO, JAC, SON, RAD, LID, WHI), INFRA (SEE, BAZ, TAU, MNT), MEDIA (JEL, PLX, EMB).

Variable.Name: DASHBOARD_LANDING
Variable.Description: Default page on load (e.g., sonarr/calendar, radarr/upcoming). Leave blank to show dashboard grid.

Variable.Name: BASIC_AUTH_CREDENTIALS
Variable.Description: Format: user:pass or user1:pass1|user2:pass2 for multiple users. Only used if AUTHTYPE=basic.

Config.Name: Test Mode
Config.Description: Set to true during initial setup to prevent Let's Encrypt rate limiting

Config.Name: Access Mode
Config.Description: Set to public for HTTPS with Let's Encrypt

Config.Name: Dashboard Layout
Config.Description: Choose: classic, modern, storm, storm-violet, neon, focus, vixens, minimal

Config.Name: Dashboard Landing Page
Config.Description: Default page on load (e.g., sonarr/calendar, radarr/upcoming)
